title: BatCrosshair
description: Simple bat crosshair 🦇 (You might be Batman)
body:
🦇 Simple Bat Crosshair
A clean and minimalist crosshair for your Minecraft adventures. Designed for players who want a unique look without cluttering their screen.
 * Simple & Clean: Doesn't block your view.
 * PvP Ready: Precise enough for combat.
